latin: Pueri puerum tardum persequebantur. amica eius clamavit: 'curre, Forreste, curre!' et subito crura eius ferreis vinculis liberata sunt, et celerrime omnium cucurrit.

questions.prompt: What happened to his leg braces?
questions.target: They broke off and he ran incredibly fast
choices: They broke off and he ran incredibly fast

translation: Boys were chasing a slow boy. His friend shouted: 'Run, Forrest, run!' And suddenly his legs were freed from their iron braces, and he ran the fastest of all.
